execution_order: Review this manifest and verify all source artifact paths/checksums.
Run bounded CPU probes for local/remote production rows without broad all-suite launches.
Run matching office GPU probes with solver traces and memory accounting.
Run QA/QH next-grid bootstrap-current ladder at identical radii for JAX, Fortran v3, and Redl.
Promote or regenerate QI nfp1-4 VMEC-JAX fixtures into owned external-data artifacts.
Only regenerate README/docs runtime, memory, parity, and bootstrap figures from passing artifacts.

open_lanes.next_gate: rerun CPU/GPU rows from benchmark_floor_gaps and short_fortran_runtime_cases
residual-clean next-grid ladder before production 25x39x60x7 claim
strict true-residual admission plus RSS/runtime improvement over exact LU
nfp1-4 owned fixture manifest and CPU/GPU production-resolution ladder
single-case multi-GPU and multi-CPU scaling on production-sized work
README/docs plots regenerated only from passing production artifacts

qa_qh_bootstrap.current_claim_boundary: 11-surface same-resolution SFINCS_JAX/SFINCS Fortran v3 diagnostic; production parity still requires residual, convergence, and accuracy gates.
next_required_ladder: rerun same QA/QH surfaces at a bounded mid-grid with residual-clean solves
promote to 25x39x60x7 or documented production-equivalent floor
keep SFINCS_JAX, SFINCS Fortran v3, and Redl on the same radii and normalization
regenerate error bars from real-space and velocity-space refinement

performance.memory_definition: JAX: factor+CSR estimate. Fortran: parsed MUMPS memory metric or process RSS from logs.

memory_peak_mb.definition: Peak over plotted surfaces. JAX uses linear-solver factor plus CSR estimates from HDF5; Fortran v3 uses archived MUMPS effective total factor memory when present.

runtime_total_s.definition: Sum of per-surface solve wall times for the radial points shown in the figure.

qa_qh_bootstrap.current_claim_boundary: 11-surface same-resolution SFINCS_JAX/SFINCS Fortran v3 diagnostic; production parity still requires residual, convergence, and accuracy gates.
next_required_ladder: rerun same QA/QH surfaces at a bounded mid-grid with residual-clean solves
promote to 25x39x60x7 or documented production-equivalent floor
keep SFINCS_JAX, SFINCS Fortran v3, and Redl on the same radii and normalization
regenerate error bars from real-space and velocity-space refinement

performance.memory_definition: JAX: factor+CSR estimate. Fortran: parsed MUMPS memory metric or process RSS from logs.

memory_peak_mb.definition: Peak over plotted surfaces. JAX uses linear-solver factor plus CSR estimates from HDF5; Fortran v3 uses archived MUMPS effective total factor memory when present.

runtime_total_s.definition: Sum of per-surface solve wall times for the radial points shown in the figure.

open_blockers: Run and check in production-resolution CPU multi-seed summary artifact before promoting broad public-auto QI.
Run and check in production-resolution GPU0 multi-seed summary artifact before promoting broad public-auto QI.
Keep true device-QI closed deferred until an operator-Krylov device-QI scale-0.60 GPU hard-seed artifact writes output, trace, and accepted-converged residual metadata.
Keep the augmented-seed operator-Krylov device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed augmented-seed metadata.
Keep the global-moment closure device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed global-moment residual-equation metadata.
Keep the residual-Galerkin device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed residual-derived Galerkin metadata.
Keep the phase-space coarse-reuse device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed phase-space residual-equation metadata.
Keep the residual-region/bounce-region device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed residual-bounce coarse metadata.
Keep the block-Schur residual device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed block-Schur residual metadata.
Keep the coupled residual-equation device-QI probe fail-closed until a converged artifact reports observed coupled-equation metadata.
Do not use the non-autodiff host fallback as evidence for differentiable or true device-resident QI.
qi_evidence.release_gate_reason: Scoped production non-autodiff host fallback evidence is release-ready; the broad public auto QI gate remains a bounded proxy until production-resolution CPU/GPU ladders pass, and true device-QI is closed deferred post-release.
